data.current_description: Returns the list of collaborators for a template.

message: Operation 'addCollaborator' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on required inputs (request body structure), what is returned, and the complete side effect (email invitation). Enhanced description specifies the request schema requirement, email invitation behavior, and response format to enable AI agents to properly construct requests and understand the operation's effects.

data.current_summary: Add a collaborator to a template
data.current_description: Adds a collaborator who can edit the template. An email invitation is sent when the email is provided.
data.description_suggestion: Adds a new collaborator to a template with edit permissions. Requires the template_id path parameter and an AddCollaboratorRequest body containing the collaborator's email address. Sends an email invitation to the provided email address to notify them of template access. Returns the created Collaborator object with the new collaborator's details and permissions.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on required inputs (request body structure), what is returned, and the complete side effect (email invitation). Enhanced description specifies the request schema requirement, email invitation behavior, and response format to enable AI agents to properly construct requests and understand the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'removeCollaborator' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is incomplete regarding inputs and outputs. Added clarity on required path parameters, the complete side effect (loss of view and edit access), and what response to expect. This helps AI agents understand the full scope of the operation and its consequences for template access control.

data.current_summary: Remove a collaborator from a template
data.current_description: Removes the collaborator's permission to edit the template.
data.description_suggestion: Removes a collaborator's access to a template, revoking their edit permissions. Requires the template_id and template_collaborator_id path parameters. The collaborator will no longer be able to view or edit the template. Returns a success response confirming the removal.
data.reasoning: Current description is incomplete regarding inputs and outputs. Added clarity on required path parameters, the complete side effect (loss of view and edit access), and what response to expect. This helps AI agents understand the full scope of the operation and its consequences for template access control.

data.current_summary: Delete a signer from a contract
data.current_description: Removes a signer from the contract.
data.description_suggestion: Removes a signer from the specified contract. The signer will no longer receive signing requests or have access to sign the contract. Returns confirmation of the deletion. This action cannot be undone if the contract has already been sent.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks information about what happens to the signer after removal, the return value, and important side effects (irreversibility after contract is sent). Added these details to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.
